sessions.summary: Created harness artifacts: CLAUDE.md, feature_list.json, claude-progress.json, init.sh
sessions.notes: Project not yet scaffolded. Feature 1 (scaffold) is next.

sessions.summary: Scaffolded Next.js 16 + Tailwind v4 + TypeScript + Framer Motion. Created app structure, design tokens, content constants, component inventory. Build verified passing.
sessions.notes: Fixed module format (removed commonjs type). Next: Feature 2 (sidebar navigation).

sessions.summary: Built sidebar navigation: fixed left sidebar (desktop), hamburger drawer (mobile) with Framer Motion. Nav icons, social links, Space Grotesk font.
sessions.notes: Fixed JSX.Element type for React 19 (use React.ReactNode). Next: Feature 3 (hero section).

sessions.summary: Built hero section: name, tagline, location, CTA buttons, animated entrance, background data viz grid.
Built domain expertise bento grid: 6 cards with icons, hover-reveal descriptions, left accent bar animation.
Built experience timeline: 5 entries, alternating left/right, vertical line, diamond markers, scroll animations.
Built tech stack section: 4 function groups with animated skill bars, data sources line.
Built education section: USC and U of Iowa entries, minimal cards with icons.
Built contact section: inquiry form (project type, email, message), LinkedIn/GitHub links, copyright footer.
Made all sections mobile-responsive: domain cards show descriptions on mobile, smooth scroll, all grids stack properly.
Added typing animation in hero, scanline overlay, all Framer Motion transitions polished.
sessions.notes: All 10 features complete. Site fully built.

sessions.summary: User-directed refinements: corrected LinkedIn (yilewu) and GitHub (dylanwuplayground) URLs, removed View Work button from hero, centered contact section with FormSubmit.co integration (dylanwu516@gmail.com), enlarged education cards, added mParticle/Redshift/Optimizely/Split/Amplitude to tech stack.
sessions.notes: Updated CLAUDE.md with post-build decisions so future agents understand the rationale.

sessions.summary: Major refinements: Stitch-style typography (larger headings, tracking-tight, uppercase labels), hero rework (copper italic accents, typing animation), domain descriptions fixed to noun-start, experience highlights from resume, school logos (USC Trojan + Iowa Hawkeye), terminal status bar, JetBrains Mono for metadata, glitch hover effect, terminal section transitions, drum/barrel scroll on experience timeline with year markers, removed rocket icon.
sessions.notes: Experience section: drum scroll uses scale+Y-offset (no rotateX to avoid blur). Year markers on left, cards on right, 3-column grid. Text sharpness confirmed after multiple iterations. Rocket removed. Next: add directional rocket back with scroll-direction awareness.
